response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, open-source contributions, and exposure to agentic workflows at re:cinq, but lacks demonstrable production-scale multi-agent AI systems in fintech, regulatory compliance experience, or leadership scaling teams beyond 10 people — critical gaps for a CTO role in regulated AI-driven fintech infrastructure.
strengths: Hands-on experience with agentic workflows and MCP frameworks at re:cinq
Proven ability to build and deploy event-driven, scalable systems (e.g., GISCollective, real-time data services)
Strong engineering culture contributions via testing, CI/CD, and knowledge sharing
concerns: No evidence of leading engineering teams beyond 10 people or developing senior technical leadership layers
Lacks demonstrable experience in fintech infrastructure, credit risk, or regulatory compliance domains
No clear track record of architecting model-agnostic, production-grade multi-agent AI systems with feedback loops
